headline: American Water Works (NYSE:AWK) Q1 Earnings Miss Weighs on Stock
summary: American Water Works Q1 2026 EPS of $1.01 missed estimates by $0.09, despite revenue in line at $1.207B. Shares fell 1.2% as the market punished the bottom-line miss amid reaffirmed guidance.

headline: American Water Announces Dividend Increase
summary: American Water Works Company, Inc. (NYSE: AWK) announced that its board of directors today declared a quarterly cash dividend payment of $0.8950 per share of common stock, an increase of 8.2 percent from last quarter's cash dividend.
